meaning: n.贝多因人(一个居无定所的阿拉伯游牧民族)
examples: The Bedouin of Sinai loathe the old order.
Qatar's culture is based on Bedouin poetry, song and dance.
Whole tribes of Bedouin once roamed from Libya to Iraq.
He wore sandals and full Bedouin dress when he went to see his military superiors.
The kingdom is now a complex, diverse country far removed from the Al Sauds' Bedouin origins.
